name: Impossible Ecology
description: Run a seeded three-intervention terrarium protocol, observe every response tick, and physically quarantine the organism that violates the causal law.
natural_language: Run the posted CLIMATE, FOOD, and LIGHT protocol in order. Let every response cycle finish, compare all five habitats, then drag the causal violator into quarantine and certify it.

metadata.variant_count_kind: culprit, anomaly law, protocol, palette, and habitat-label combinations
metadata.notes: Five initially identical organisms run through three timer-driven causal interventions; the verifier independently replays every response snapshot and the final physical quarantine drag.
